classes.name: Military Systems Dev
classes.summary: C++, Ada later, Linux, GUIs, telemetry, message parsing, simulation, fault injection, sustainment.

classes.name: Game Dev
classes.summary: SDL, rendering, input, collision, ECS, animation, audio, game loops, playable demos.

classes.name: Linux Toolsmith
classes.summary: Small useful utilities, shell habits, /proc and /sys, logs, automation, packaging.

classes.name: Web Tool Dev
classes.summary: FastAPI, SQLite, dashboards, forms, simple local tools, proof trackers.

classes.name: Simulation Dev
classes.summary: Fixed timestep, replay, telemetry, deterministic behavior, fault injection, mission-style systems.

zones.name: The Compiler Yard
zones.summary: Starting area. Printing, variables, arithmetic, strings, input, decisions, loops, functions, vectors, files, CMake, GitHub proof.

zones.name: Utility Crossroads
zones.summary: Useful console programs. Menus, validation, random events, small games, logs, CSV, config, and command-line habits.

zones.name: Data Homestead
zones.summary: Strings, vectors, arrays, structs, enums, search, sort, records, simple data tools, and cleaner functions.

zones.name: SDL Fields
zones.summary: SDL basics. Windows, renderer, events, rectangles, keyboard, mouse, delta time, and visual debug demos.

zones.name: Gameplay Garrison
zones.summary: Playable game systems. Game states, collision, spawning, score, animation, save files, and a complete small game.

zones.name: ECS Catacombs
zones.summary: ECS architecture. Entity IDs, components, systems, storage, inspectors, spawn/despawn, and data-oriented gameplay demos.

zones.name: Toolmaker’s Valley
zones.summary: Engineering tools. Logging, config, developer console, profiling, test harnesses, install scripts, and release discipline.

zones.name: Simulation Highlands
zones.summary: Simulation discipline. Fixed timestep, deterministic input, replay, telemetry, health panels, fault injection, and time controls.

zones.name: Military Systems Range
zones.summary: Military/sustainment systems. Ada/C++ style, message parsing, bus monitors, HIL mock devices, Linux diagnostics, and safety checks.

zones.name: Senior Citadel
zones.summary: Senior-level integration. Architecture, tests, performance, docs, refactoring, packaging, and final capstone workbench.
